response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video's first musical segment (00:00-01:54) as 'Sweets Parade'. Performed by Nene, Noel, Watame, Pekora, and Luna. Original composer: chi-mey. Searched for lyrics using 'Sweets Parade Inu x Boku SS lyrics'.
2. Identified the second musical segment (01:54-04:59) as 'ようこそジャパリパークへ' (Welcome to Japari Park). Performed by Noel, Watame, Botan, and Polka. Original artist/composer: Masayoshi Oishi. Searched for lyrics using 'ようこそジャパリパークへ lyrics'.
3. Compiled data and lyrics for both segments into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: This video contains two musical performances by Hololive VTubers. First, a group (Nene, Noel, Watame, Pekora, Luna) performs 'Sweets Parade'. Second, a group (Noel, Watame, Botan, Polka) performs 'ようこそジャパリパークへ' (Welcome to Japari Park).

scenes.description: The song 'Sweets Parade' is performed by Momosuzu Nene, Shirogane Noel, Tsunomaki Watame, Usada Pekora, and Himemori Luna. The title 'Sweets Parade' is displayed on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Welcome to Japari Park!
Today is also a chaotic, noisy day.
Grrr! Roar!
If we laugh out loud, we're friends.
Even if we fight and things get chaotic, we're still friends.
Even if there are animals, there are no pariahs.
The true love is right here.
Look, you should hold hands and go on a great adventure too!
(One, Two, Three)
Welcome to Japari Park!
Today is also a chaotic, noisy day.
Because everyone has their own different appearance and shape,
We are attracted to each other.
If I gently overlap my fingers against the sunset sky,
Nice to meet you.
I want to know more about you.
Grrr! Roar!
If I look back, there's trouble everywhere.
What the heck? Everything's scattered, it doesn't make sense, it just won't settle down.
We're animals, so please forgive us.
Everyone is living freely.
Yes, you don't have to keep up appearances, it's okay.
(Here you go)
Nice to meet you Japari Park!
From today, please be kind to me.
We were always waiting for your gentle smile, anytime, anywhere.
If we talk a lot about our dreams in front of the open gate,
Great journey continuing anywhere.
Oh, roar to the East, roar to the West.
Let the Safari Melody echo throughout the world.
- Welcome to Japari Park!
Welcome to Japari Park!
Today is also a chaotic, noisy day.
Because everyone has their own different appearance and shape,
We are attracted to each other.
If I gently overlap my fingers against the sunset sky,
Nice to meet you.
I want to know more about you.
Grrr! Roar!
La la la la, la la la la
Oh, welcome to the Japari Park!
La la la la, la la la la, la la la, gather round, friends!
La la la la, la la la la
Oh, welcome to the Japari Park!
La la la la, la la la la, la la la, dreamy departure.
Welcome to Japari Park!
